How do you find the rate from the factor: 您如何从因数中找到利率 ?
r = b − 1; positive r = growth, negative: r = b - 1;正 r = 增长,负 r = 衰变

How do you compare two exponential model: 你如何比较两个指数模型?

The initial value (the amount when x = 0: 初始值( 当 x = 0 时的数值)
